subcodes.first_line: O Lord! Thou art the Refuge of the helpless and the Shelter of the wanderers. Thy grace and bounty are the remedy for every ill and the heavenly feast [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پروردگار ملجا بیچارگانی و ملاذ آوارگان فضل و عطایت درمان هر دردی و خوان
subcodes.subjects: @relationship between government and people, @obedience to and respect for government authority, @spiritual transformation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization
